title: DTS e-ink review pass 1: compatible and resolution
description: Codereview pass 1: P2 - node name 'uc81xx@0' should mimic t_deck_display style; P3 - add rotation property?; confirmed resolution 152x152 per panel datasheet cross-check with Meshtastic variant. No P0/P1. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Fixed DTS node label to t_echo_display (mimics t_deck_display), compatible to ultrachip,uc8176 for correct driver quirks and 152x152 resolution support, updated puck overlay references and comments. Verified with 3 codereview passes (P0-P4 all addressed or tracked as opinion). West build clean for t_echo puck.
